# Tech Stack

<!-- Generated by /caveman-docs:ai-context. Manual edits overwritten on re-run. -->

## AS IS — Current state

### Runtime and language

| Tech | Version | Role |
|------|---------|------|
| Node.js | System-provided (required by `hooks/install.sh:17`) | Hook scripts + settings.json mutation |
| Bash | POSIX-compatible | Installer / uninstaller |
| CommonJS | `"type": "commonjs"` in `hooks/package.json` | Module format for `.js` hooks |
| Claude Code CLI | macOS / Linux | Host runtime for hooks, commands, skills, agents |

### Tests

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| Runner | None (doc-mode plugin) |
| Assertion lib | N/A |
| Mock lib | N/A |
| Coverage | N/A |
| Validation | `test -f`, `grep -q`, `wc -c` (see `commands/ai-context.md:42-67`) |

### Tooling

| Tool | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `fs`, `path`, `os` (Node stdlib) | File ops, flag file, cross-platform paths |
| `JSON.parse` / `JSON.stringify` | Hook stdin I/O + settings.json mutation |
| Regex literals | AI doc path matching, prompt intent detection |
